name: Ryan
character_block: 26-year-old male travel enthusiast with casual travel-ready style, short hair, comfortable travel attire, realistic skin texture, authentic travel energy, expressive hands when demonstrating travel products, natural speaking manner
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with travel environment shots, natural hand movement showing travel accessories, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
environment_block: travel setting with luggage, travel accessories, airport or hotel room environment, realistic travel atmosphere
platform_block: realistic TikTok travel content style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic travel enthusiast vibe, practical travel demonstrations
lighting_block: natural airport or hotel lighting, soft shadows, realistic travel environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure on bright surfaces
motion_block: natural hand movements when packing or using travel products, smooth practical demonstrations, authentic satisfaction reactions with travel solutions
audio_block: subtle luggage sounds, product interaction sounds, travel environment ambience, authentic enthusiastic speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury travel influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
